'''Skids''' was [[Esege Tuketu]]'s [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] onboard their [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-Wing]] bomber. He was a bit of a jokester and his mother expected him to be more than a pilot with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Skids was killed at the [[Battle of ILC-905]] when he and Tuketu sacrificed their lives to destroy a [[Yevetha]]n [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]].
